code: import React from'react';import{Wallet,TrendingUp,TrendingDown}from'lucide-react';import{useApp}from'../../context/AppContext';import{getSummary,formatINR}from'../../utils';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function SummaryCards(){const{state}=useApp();const{income,expense,balance}=getSummary(state.transactions);const savingsRate=income>0?((income-expense)/income*100).toFixed(1):0;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card summary-card balance",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-label",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Wallet,{size:12}),"Net Balance"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"summary-value balance mono",children:formatINR(balance,true)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-sub",children:["Savings rate: ",savingsRate,"%"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card summary-card income",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-label",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TrendingUp,{size:12}),"Total Income"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"summary-value income mono",children:formatINR(income,true)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-sub",children:[state.transactions.filter(t=>t.type==='income').length," transactions"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card summary-card expense",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-label",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TrendingDown,{size:12}),"Total Expenses"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"summary-value expense mono",children:formatINR(expense,true)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-sub",children:[state.transactions.filter(t=>t.type==='expense').length," transactions"]})]})]});}
